task_completion.description: Verify that a material named 'SandMaterial' is created and assigned to the 'GroundPlane' object.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender interface (Properties panel or Outliner), 'GroundPlane' is selected and its active material is named 'SandMaterial'.

task_completion.description: Verify the diffuse texture is loaded and connected to the material's Base Color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shader Editor, an Image Texture node loading 'diffuse.jpg' from '/home/ga/Assets/Textures/' is connected to the Base Color input of the Principled BSDF node.

task_completion.description: Verify the roughness texture is loaded, configured for physical accuracy, and connected to the material's Roughness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shader Editor, an Image Texture node loading 'roughness.jpg' is present, its Color Space is set to 'Non-Color', and it is connected to the Roughness input of the Principled BSDF node.

task_completion.description: Verify the normal texture is loaded, configured for physical accuracy, and connected correctly to the material's Normal input.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Shader Editor, an Image Texture node loading 'normal.jpg' with Color Space set to 'Non-Color' is connected to a 'Normal Map' node, which is then connected to the Normal input of the Principled BSDF node.

task_completion.description: Verify the scene is rendered and saved to the specified PNG path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender's render window is shown completing the render, and a file manager or terminal confirms 'pbr_render.png' exists in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Blender project is saved to the specified .blend file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender's window title bar shows 'pbr_material_complete.blend' or a file manager/terminal shows the file exists in '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/'.

integrity.description: The agent used Blender's GUI (Shader Editor, Properties panel) to set up the material rather than bypassing the UI with a pre-written Python script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender interface with the Shader Editor open, nodes being manually added, and connections being dragged between them.

integrity.description: The render output is genuinely generated from Blender.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender Render window (F12) is visible at some point showing the rendering process of the sand material.

integrity.description: The agent used Blender's save functionality to save the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender 'Save As' dialog is visible, or the user interacts with the File > Save menu, updating the top window bar to reflect the new filename.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Object: 'GroundPlane'. Target Material: 'SandMaterial'. Required Textures: 'diffuse.jpg', 'roughness.jpg', 'normal.jpg' located in '/home/ga/Assets/Textures/'. Output Render Path: '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/pbr_render.png'. Output Blend Path: '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/pbr_material_complete.blend'. Physical accuracy requires roughness and normal maps to be set to 'Non-Color' data in the Image Texture node, and the normal map must be routed through a 'Normal Map' node before connecting to the Principled BSDF.
